ci_method: 5-fold CV-AUC; 2000-rep bootstrap 95% CI on the OOF AUC
verdict: LENGTH-ROBUST (clean) — on a frontier matched corpus (n=200) dropping the length features changes CV-AUC by only +0.009 (cv_full 0.834 CI[0.7767, 0.892] -> cv_nolen 0.825); the v0 signal is register/content, length confound negligible. Confirms + tightens the CEM range. Underpowered caveat: single seed, single frontier generator.
